title: Hitachi India South Asia Partners is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Hitachi India South Asia Partners is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
We at Hitachi India South Asia Partners are looking for an experienced Quality Control Engineer based out of Coimbatore. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Hitachi India South Asia Partners:
Hitachi India South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hitachi India South Asia Partners!
